summary: Complete testing of 90-day deferred payment feature. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed including toggle visibility, 84-month eligibility, 96-month ineligibility message, combined loyalty+deferred, and period switch toggle reset.
critical_code_review_comments: Deferred calculation logic correctly implements compound interest formula: P * (1 + r/12)^2
canDefer check properly enforces selectedTerm <= 84 limit
UI message 'Non disponible pour 96 mois (max 84)' is shown when 96-month term selected
Both loyalty and deferred toggles can be combined - rate reduction applies before capitalization
seed_data_creation: Using existing March 2026 program metadata with no_payments_days=90
context_for_next_testing_agent: 90-day deferred payment feature fully tested. Toggle appears in EventBanner. Eligible for terms <= 84 months. Shows 'Non disponible pour 96 mois' at 96-month term. Period switch resets both toggles to unchecked.

Default_Unchecked_State.behavior: Toggle is unchecked by default - never auto-applied

84Month_Eligibility.behavior: Toggle can be checked at 84-month term

Combined_Loyalty_And_Deferred.behavior: Both toggles can be enabled simultaneously
Combined_Loyalty_And_Deferred.calculation: Loyalty rate reduction applies first, then deferred capitalization

Period_Switch_Reset.behavior: Switching period resets both checkboxes to unchecked

screenshots: .screenshots/final_01_full.png - Full page with 96mo selected showing 'Non disponible'
